[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000101 2
1 000011010 3
2 100101111 6
3 101101011 6
4 010111011 6
5 110111011 7
6 000101111 5
7 101001001 4

01 10 110010100 4
12 21 101100110 5
23 32 101000110 4
34 43 000010101 3
45 54 101011111 7
56 65 000101111 5 match 6
67 76 111010001 5
70 07 100000000 1

02 20 011110010 5
13 31 000100000 1
24 42 101010011 5
35 53 101001010 4
46 64 101110000 4
57 75 111111110 8
60 06 011010001 4
71 17 010010100 3

03 30 110110100 5
14 41 000110101 4
25 52 000001100 2
36 63 101100101 5
47 74 010100001 3
50 05 011111110 7
61 16 101000101 4
72 27 111110010 6

04 40 110100001 4
15 51 101101010 5
26 62 000100011 3
37 73 010110100 4
